automation.name: E.5 LinkedIn profile reader (verify)
automation.goal: Open https://www.linkedin.com/in/satyanadella/ using goto_url. Wait for the page to settle (wait_for_load), capture a screenshot, then extract the profile name and current role/company from the visible page. If you see a sign-in/login page (Join LinkedIn, Sign in to continue), report `gated:true` and return what you saw via final_answer. Otherwise return a final_answer with the format: `Name: <name>. Role: <role at company>.`
